message: WMI-1 shared-state divergence (signal-set-unchecked): 'nl_dump_check_consistent' sets signal field 'netlink_callback.prev_seq', which a different component branches on to reinterpret the object — a candidate ungoverned signal. [mechanism:unchecked-signal-field-set;indicates=WMI-1] [mem:struct=netlink_callback;field=prev_seq;offset=64] [oracle:assert=netlink_callback.prev_seq stays within the domain its consumer's agreement governs;assume=producer sets prev_seq without enforcing the consumer's cross-field invariant]
